observation: 3 purchase orders above INR 10L were processed without competitive bidding as required by procurement policy section 4.2
recommendation: Implement system-level control in SAP to block PO creation above threshold without minimum 3 quotations
management_response: Agreed — SAP workflow to be configured by IT; interim manual check by procurement head for all POs >10L

observation: Average invoice processing time is 12 days against target of 7 days — causing vendor payment delays and potential LD for late payment
recommendation: Streamline approval workflow — reduce from 4 levels to 2 for invoices <5L; implement auto-routing in SAP
management_response: Partially agreed — will reduce to 3 levels for <5L; SAP auto-routing being evaluated

observation: Project PRJ-DC-2025-008 exceeded approved budget by 18% (INR 2.4 Cr overrun) without formal variation order or management approval
recommendation: Implement monthly project cost review with mandatory variance analysis; auto-escalation for >5% overrun
management_response: Agreed — monthly project review committee constituted; SAP cost center alerts being configured

observation: Personnel files for 15 out of 50 sampled employees (30%) were missing signed confidentiality agreements
recommendation: Conduct drive to obtain signed NDAs from all existing employees; make NDA signing mandatory in onboarding checklist
management_response: Agreed — HR team to complete NDA collection within 60 days; checklist updated

observation: Refresher safety training for crane operators was overdue by 3 months for 4 operators at Chinchwad facility
recommendation: Immediate scheduling of refresher training; suspend crane operation authorization until training complete
management_response: Agreed — training scheduled for 2026-02-20; operators restricted to supervised operation until then

observation: GST input tax credit of INR 8.5L claimed on invoices where supplier has not filed GSTR-1 returns — ITC at risk of reversal
recommendation: Implement monthly GSTR-2A/2B reconciliation before ITC claim; follow up with non-compliant vendors
management_response: Agreed — monthly reconciliation process initiated; vendor compliance monitoring dashboard created

observation: 12 user accounts of separated employees still active in SAP and email systems — separation dates ranging from 30 to 120 days ago
recommendation: Implement automated account deactivation linked to HR separation workflow; immediate manual deactivation of identified accounts
management_response: Immediate action taken — all 12 accounts deactivated; IT-HR integration project approved for Q2

observation: Physical stock count at Savli stores showed discrepancy of INR 35L between SAP records and actual inventory — mainly in pipe fittings and gaskets
recommendation: Conduct root cause analysis; implement cycle counting program; review GRN and issue procedures
management_response: Root cause analysis initiated — suspected unreported issues and GRN timing differences; cycle counting plan being developed
